meta.summary: RepeatMasker-compatible BLAST+ distribution with rmblastn and RepeatMasker/RepeatModeler-specific nucleotide search options.
meta.description: RepeatMasker-compatible BLAST+ distribution with rmblastn and RepeatMasker/RepeatModeler-specific nucleotide search options.

test: rmblastn -help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Nucleotide-Nucleotide BLAST with RepeatMasker Extensions 2.17.1+' >/dev/null && rmblastn -help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '-complexity_adjust' >/dev/null && rmblastn -help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '-mask_level' >/dev/null && rmblastn -help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '-mask_level_algo' >/dev/null

ldd "$(command -v rmblastn)" | grep -F 'libsqlite3' >/dev/null && ldd "$(command -v rmblastn)" | grep -F 'libgomp' >/dev/null && ! ldd "$(command -v rmblastn)" | grep -F 'not found' >/dev/null && perl -v >/dev/null && curl --version >/dev/null

makeblastdb -help 2>&1 | grep -F 'USAGE' >/dev/null && blastdbcmd -help 2>&1 | grep -F 'USAGE' >/dev/null && blast_formatter -help 2>&1 | grep -F 'USAGE' >/dev/null && dustmasker -help 2>&1 | grep -F 'USAGE' >/dev/null && segmasker -help 2>&1 | grep -F 'USAGE' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-rmblast-rmblastn && cd /tmp/taf-rmblast-rmblastn && printf '>s
ACGTTGCATGTCAGTACGATCGTACGATGCTAGCTAGGATCCGATCGTACGTTGCATGTCAGTACGATCGTACGATGCTAGCTAGGATCCGATCGT
' > db.fa && makeblastdb -in db.fa -dbtype nucl -out db >/dev/null && printf '>q
ACGTTGCATGTCAGTACGATCGTACGATGCTAGCTAGGATCCGATCGT
' > q.fa && rmblastn -query q.fa -db db -task megablast -dust no -outfmt '6 qseqid sseqid pident length' | awk '$1=="q" && $2=="s" && $3=="100.000" && $4>=48 {found=1} END {exit !found}'

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-rmblast-blastn && cd /tmp/taf-rmblast-blastn && printf '>s
ACGTTGCATGTCAGTACGATCGTACGATGCTAGCTAGGATCCGATCGTACGTTGCATGTCAGTACGATCGTACGATGCTAGCTAGGATCCGATCGT
' > db.fa && makeblastdb -in db.fa -dbtype nucl -out db >/dev/null && printf '>q
ACGTTGCATGTCAGTACGATCGTACGATGCTAGCTAGGATCCGATCGT
' > q.fa && blastn -query q.fa -db db -task megablast -dust no -outfmt '6 qseqid sseqid pident length' | awk '$1=="q" && $2=="s" && $3=="100.000" && $4>=48 {found=1} END {exit !found}'
legacy_blast.pl --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'legacy_blast.pl' >/dev/null && update_blastdb.pl --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'update_blastdb.pl' >/dev/null && command -v get_species_taxids.sh >/dev/null

upstream.name: RMBlast
upstream.license: OSL-2.1 with bundled NCBI public-domain BLAST+ components
upstream.citation: Camacho et al. 2009 for BLAST+; RMBlast authors: Smit, Hubley, Rosen
